Register.name: exec
Register.description: Execution Mask (64-bit, controls which lanes are active in a wavefront)

Register.name: exec_lo
Register.description: Execution Mask low 32 bits (alias for wave32 or explicit access)

Register.name: exec_hi
Register.description: Execution Mask high 32 bits (wave64 upper half)

Register.name: vcc
Register.description: Vector Condition Code (64-bit, result of VOPC comparisons on wave64)

Register.name: vcc_lo
Register.description: Vector Condition Code low 32 bits (wave32 vcc, or lower half of wave64)

Register.name: vcc_hi
Register.description: Vector Condition Code high 32 bits (wave64 upper half)

Register.name: m0
Register.description: M0: multipurpose scalar register (LDS addressing, interpolation, indirect branch target)

Register.name: scc
Register.description: Scalar Condition Code (1-bit, result of SOPC/SOP2 comparisons)

Register.name: flat_scratch
Register.description: Flat Scratch base address register (64-bit base for private/scratch memory)

Register.name: flat_scratch_lo
Register.description: Flat Scratch base address low 32 bits

Register.name: flat_scratch_hi
Register.description: Flat Scratch base address high 32 bits

Register.name: xnack_mask
Register.description: XNACK retry mask (64-bit, tracks pending memory retry on XNACK-enabled hardware)

Register.name: xnack_mask_lo
Register.description: XNACK retry mask low 32 bits

Register.name: xnack_mask_hi
Register.description: XNACK retry mask high 32 bits

Register.name: src_shared_base
Register.description: LDS/shared memory base address

Register.name: src_shared_limit
Register.description: LDS/shared memory limit address

Register.name: src_private_base
Register.description: Private/scratch memory base address

Register.name: src_private_limit
Register.description: Private/scratch memory limit address

Register.name: src_pops_exiting_wave_id
Register.description: POPS (Primitive Ordered Pixel Shading) exiting wave ID
